items.name: sensing-flow-mobile
items.description: センシングからラベル付け等々まで一貫して提供するプラットフォームのモバイルアプリ側（仮）

items.name: kaiyn-website
items.description: Multilingual marketing site for the Kaiyn crypto trading community. Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui (maia), next-intl (en / zh-TW / zh-CN).

items.name: forge
items.description: Forge is a CLI for creating minimal React starters with Next.js, Vite, or TanStack Start. Choose Base UI or Radix UI, RTL or LTR, and Biome, ESLint + Prettier, or Oxlint + Oxfmt. Built on shadcn with theme support, sound hooks, metadata, and clean app shells.

items.name: wave-ui
items.description: Wave UI is a component library built on Base UI primitives and Tailwind CSS v4.

items.name: patch-ui
items.description: A React component library built on Base UI, Tailwind CSS v4, and a --patch-* design token system. Copy-in via a shadcn-compatible registry.

items.name: animated-todo-app
items.description: A classic to-do list, but with animations

items.name: tanstack-cn
items.description: TanStack Start + shadcn template with a one-command scaffolder. Vite 8 + Oxc, Tailwind v4, base-luma on Base UI, React 19, TypeScript 6, Vitest 4. npm, pnpm, bun, or yarn.

items.name: nutritracker
items.description: Track daily meals and macros. Next.js + Redux + Supabase

items.name: paalstack-react-ui
items.description: An open-source collection of React components, icons, and hooks for building modern web applications — powered by Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, and Base UI.

items.name: Blazix.BaseUI
items.description: An unofficial port of Base-UI headless library in to Blazor

items.name: warcraftcn-ui
items.description: 🎨 Create beautiful Warcraft-themed UI components for your projects. Free and open-source, designed to enhance your development experience.

items.name: devmetry
items.description: Developer metrics dashboard built with Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, GSAP animations, and Jest. Development powered with Superpowers skills (brainstorming, TDD, code review, parallel agents).

items.name: base-ui-masonry
items.description: A responsive, highly optimized, justified masonry layout component with support for variable column widths and virtualization built for being used alongside BaseUI in React projects.
